description: Custom A2UI catalog for the a2ui-demo monorepo. Each entry maps to a React component from the matching @a2ui-demo/* package.

Card.description: Framed container with an optional title and a single child component reference.

props.title: DynamicString — optional. Heading shown at the top.
props.child: ComponentId — optional. The id of another component to render inside.

props.text: DynamicString — required. The text to render.
props.weight: Literal — optional. One of 'normal' | 'bold' | 'subtle'. Defaults to 'normal'.

Button.description: Click button. Emits the onClick action.

props.label: DynamicString — required. Button text.
props.variant: Literal — optional. One of 'primary' | 'secondary'. Defaults to 'primary'.
props.onClick: Action — optional. Fires when the user clicks.

TextInput.description: Single-line text field. The 'value' prop accepts an initial value (literal or path-bound). Local edits stay client-side; the agent can read the resulting data model on the next round-trip.

props.label: DynamicString — optional.
props.value: DynamicString — optional initial value, bindable to a data model path.
props.onChange: Action — optional. Fires when the user edits the value.
